com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Profile
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the user's profile page including their posts, followers, and following details.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Edit Profile
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the edit profile screen to update profile information, including bio, name, and other details.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share Profile
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Share the user's profile with others through available sharing options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Follow User
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Follow or unfollow the user displayed on the profile by interacting with the 'Follow' button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Posts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the user's posts, organized in grid view or other display formats like reels or highlights.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Story Highlights
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the user's story highlights by interacting with the highlights carousel.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Recent Story
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the user's recent story by clicking on their avatar or story thumbnail.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create Highlight
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Create a new highlight from the user's existing stories by clicking the 'Create Highlight' button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Explore Content
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Explore recommended or trending content based on user interests and activities.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Send Message
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Send a direct message to the user by clicking on the message icon or button in their profile.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View a short video (reel) posted by the user by interacting with the reel thumbnail or button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Followers
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click on the 'Followers' button to see the list of people following the user.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Following
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click on the 'Following' button to see the list of people the user is following.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Dismiss Suggested User
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Dismiss a suggested user from the suggestions carousel by clicking the 'Dismiss' button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Like a Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Like a post displayed on the user's profile by clicking on the heart icon associated with the post.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Comment on Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Comment on a post by tapping the comment icon and typing a response.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Save Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Save a post to your collection by clicking on the bookmark icon.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Share a post to your story or with other users via direct message by clicking the share icon.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Suggested Account
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View and follow suggested users based on mutual connections or common interests.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Scroll Feed
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Scroll through the user's post feed to view their latest content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Interact with Tab Bar
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch between different sections of the app like Home, Search, Reels, and Profile by clicking on the corresponding icons in the tab bar.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Change Avatar
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Change the user's profile avatar by clicking on the avatar image or button to upload a new picture.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Notifications
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View notifications for activities like new followers, comments, or likes by interacting with the notification icon in the action bar.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access the app's settings menu to adjust preferences and privacy settings.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Switch Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch between different Instagram accounts by clicking the account switcher button in the action bar.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Refresh Feed
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Refresh the profile feed by pulling down or using the swipe-refresh feature to load new content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Settings and Activity
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access settings and view activity related details on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Orders and Payments
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the section to review and manage your orders and payments within Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Help
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the Help Center to find assistance or information on using Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Privacy Center
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access the Privacy Center to manage your privacy settings and review options for protecting your data.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Account Status
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Check your account status and any related issues within settings.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: About
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View information about Instagram, including policies, terms, and other relevant details.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Account
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap to add a new Instagram account to the app.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Log Out
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Log out from the current Instagram account.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Log Out All Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Log out from all Instagram accounts currently logged in on the app.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Start creating a new post, story, reel, or other content types on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Reels
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access the Reels section to view short video content shared by users on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Record Video
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Press the button to start capturing a video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Stop Video Recording
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Stop the video recording by pressing the stop button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Navigate to Edit Screen
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click the 'Edit' button (id: 16) to go to video editing options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Audio
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Add Audio' button (id: 22) to add background music or sounds to your video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Text
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Add Text' button (id: 23) to overlay text onto the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Sticker
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Add Sticker' button (id: 24) to insert a sticker or graphic into the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Apply Effects
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Effects' button (id: 25) to apply visual effects to the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Voiceover
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Voiceover' button (id: 26) to record and add a voiceover to the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Additional Clips
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Add Clips' button (id: 27) to insert additional video clips.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Enable Captions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Captions' button (id: 28) to add automated captions or subtitles to the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Save Video
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Save' button (id: 29) to save your edited video to your gallery.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Cancel Edits
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Press the 'Cancel' button (id: 31) to discard any changes and return to the previous screen.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share Video
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the 'Share' button (id: 33) to post the edited video to the platform or share it with others.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Navigate to Video Preview
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Watch the recorded video preview in the post-capture preview area.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Apply Template
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Use the template browser (id: 45) to apply predefined templates to the video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Preview Video
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the preview button in the post-capture preview container (id: 39) to view your video before sharing.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Open Camera Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the camera tool menu (id: 52) to adjust settings like flash or resolution.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Capture Still Image
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Press the 'Capture' button (within id: 5) to take a snapshot during the video recording.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Toggle Camera Modes
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Use the mode toggle button in the pre-capture control container (id: 43) to switch between camera modes.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Enable AR Effects
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the AR effects button (id: 25) to open augmented reality effects and filters.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Adjust Clip Length
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Trim or adjust the video length by interacting with the preview container (id: 39).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Quick Capture
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Initiate a quick capture session from the quick capture fragment/container.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Shutter Button
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Capture a photo or video using the shutter button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Toggle Flash
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Turn the flash on or off using the flash button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Switch Camera
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch between the front and back camera using the switch camera button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Access Gallery
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the gallery to view previously taken or existing images and videos.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Story Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open story settings using the settings gear icon.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Expand Tools Menu
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Expand the tools menu to access additional camera functionalities.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Interactive Content Pre-Capture
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Engage with interactive content options before capturing media.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Navigate Using Swipe
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Navigate through the app interface using swipe actions within the navigation container.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Access Camera Tool Menu
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access various camera tools using the tool menu container.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Follow Suggested User
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Follow the suggested users displayed on the profile page, such as Gangadhar Mahato 92, XKarentorresx, and Aaashlllieeeyy.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Explore Similar Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: See the list of similar accounts suggested to follow after opening the 'See all' option.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Select a Media
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Select a specific post, reel, or photo displayed in the profile media section like a reel by 'huhuli' or a photo.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Leave a New Note
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Leave a new note for followers you follow back, sharing a message or update.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Delete Note
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Delete an existing note shared with the followers.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Template Browser
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Browse through available templates for creating content on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Gallery Access
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open the gallery to view, select or upload photos or videos from the device to Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Switch Album
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Use the album switcher to change between different albums in the gallery, such as Recents.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Fast Scroll Gallery
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Use the fast scroll feature to quickly navigate through the gallery images.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Share your media via various means by pressing the 'Share to' button, opening up sharing options beyond stories.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create Mode
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Enter Create Mode, which offers a more creative layout and tools for generating unique content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Boomerang
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access Boomerang, a feature that creates a looping video effect, by selecting the Boomerang button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Layout
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Select the Layout button to create collages or multi-photo layouts for your media posts.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Post Capture Controls
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Use post-capture controls to edit and manage your captured photos or videos before sharing.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Play/Pause Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to play or pause the reel currently being viewed.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Like Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Like the reel by tapping on the like button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Likes
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the list of users who liked this reel.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Comment on Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Add a comment to the reel or view existing comments.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Share the reel with others using various sharing options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: See More Options
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Access additional options for the reel by tapping the 'More' button.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Creator Profile
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Navigate to the reel creator’s profile by tapping their profile image or name.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Save Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Save the reel to your account for easy access later.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Remix Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Create a new reel using elements from the currently viewed reel.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Sequence Reel
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Organize multiple video clips into a sequence for your reel.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Control Options
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage options like translations, closed captions, and feedback for content seen.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Manage Content Preferences
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Adjust settings and preferences for the visibility and relevance of content in your feed.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Dismiss Notifications
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Dismiss or manage notifications related to activity and contents.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Story Highlights
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click on a story highlight to view it.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create Highlight
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click the 'Create highlight' button to create a new highlight from your stories.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Grid
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch to grid view to see a user's posts in a grid layout.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Reels
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch to reels view to see a user's video content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Photos of You
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View posts that you have been tagged in by switching to the 'Photos of You' tab.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Media in Row
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click on a media item (photo or video) within a row to view it in full-screen mode.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Swipe to Refresh
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Pull down to refresh the feed or profile page.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Notifications
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click on the notification icon to view your unread notifications.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Switch to Threads
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click the option to view the profile on Threads, if applicable.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create New Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click the 'Create New' button to create a new post, story, or other content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Interact with Avatar
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Click or tap on a user's avatar to view their profile or start interacting with them.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Saved Items
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on 'Saved' to view posts, photos, and other items you have saved on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Archive
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on 'Archive' to view your archived posts and stories.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Your Activity
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on 'Your Activity' to manage and view your Instagram activity, including interactions and media.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Account Privacy Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on 'Account privacy' to check or change your account privacy settings (e.g., public or private).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Manage Close Friends
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on 'Close Friends' to manage your close friends list on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Overlay Layout
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Interact with the 'Overlay layout container' for any overlays or pop-up windows that may be displayed on the screen.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Interact with Status Bar
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap or interact with the status bar to view or manage your phone's status indicators.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Interact with Navigation Bar
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap or interact with the navigation bar to access device-specific options or navigation features.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Time Management
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View and manage your Instagram usage statistics and set time limits for usage. This option can be accessed by double-tapping the section labeled 'Time management' (id 14).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Crossposting
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage your crossposting settings with other social media platforms. You can access this feature by double-tapping the section labeled 'Crossposting' (id 21).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Blocked Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage your blocked accounts or add new ones. This can be accessed by double-tapping the section labeled 'Blocked' (id 23).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Hide Story and Live
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Control who can see your Instagram Stories and live videos. Double-tap the section labeled 'Hide story and live' (id 25) to manage this setting.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Messages and Story Replies
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage who can send you messages or reply to your Instagram stories. Accessed by double-tapping the section labeled 'Messages and story replies' (id 28).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Tags and Mentions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Control who can tag or mention you in posts. Accessed by double-tapping the section labeled 'Tags and mentions' (id 30).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Comments Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Set rules for comments on your posts. You can access and modify these settings by double-tapping the section labeled 'Comments' (id 32).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Sharing and Reuse
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Control how others can share or reuse your content. Access this by double-tapping the section labeled 'Sharing and reuse' (id 34).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Restricted Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to manage accounts you have restricted, limiting how they can interact with you.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Limit Interactions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to set or manage limits on certain interactions you receive on Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Hidden Words
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to manage a list of hidden words to filter out comments containing certain words you choose.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Follow and Invite Friends
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to find and follow people or invite new users to join Instagram.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Muted Accounts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Double tap to view and manage the accounts you have muted.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Like and Share Counts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Shows the counts of likes and shares. Manage view settings.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Device Permissions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage permissions given to the device for accessing features.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Archiving and Downloading
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage your settings related to archiving and downloading your uploaded media. Double-tap for more options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Accessibility
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open accessibility settings to adjust features. Double-tap to access.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Language
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Open language settings to change the app's language. Double-tap to access.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Data Usage and Media Quality
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage data usage settings and preferences for media quality during uploads and playback. Double-tap to manage settings.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Website Permissions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Manage settings related to the in-app browser and authorized apps/websites. Double-tap for more options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: More Actions for Post
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap to view additional options for the post such as reporting, copying link, etc.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Story
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap to view a user’s story in full-screen mode.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: See Seen Status
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View the seen status for a story or post to check if someone has viewed it.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Follow User
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Follow a user by tapping their profile button from the story or post feed.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Unfollow User
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Unfollow a user by tapping the follow button again if you are already following them.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Navigate Between Posts
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Swipe or tap to move to the next or previous post or story in the feed.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Refresh Feed
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Pull down to refresh the feed or check for new updates.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Zoom Image
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Pinch to zoom in or out of an image or photo in the feed.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Media Group
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View a collection of photos or videos grouped under a media group, such as a photo album.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Switch Between Tabs
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Switch between different sections of the app (e.g., Stories, Feed, Explore) by tapping the appropriate tab.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Exit Media Viewer
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Exit from the media viewer mode and return to the feed or story section.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Mark Story as Seen
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Mark a story as seen after you have watched it completely.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Toggle Notification Settings
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Adjust notification settings for the account or story through the profile or settings menu.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Report Content
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Report a post, story, or user for inappropriate content or behavior.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Use Emoji Reaction
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: React to a post or comment using emojis (e.g., heart, thumbs up, etc.).

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Story Reactions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View who has reacted to your story or posts.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Explore New Content
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on the explore tab to discover new content, including posts, stories, and accounts.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Mute Notifications
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Mute notifications for a specific user or post, preventing further alerts.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Unmute Notifications
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Unmute notifications to receive alerts for a user or post after muting it.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Check Post Insights
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap on the insights button (if available) to see the engagement metrics for the post such as reach, impressions, and interactions.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Exit Full-Screen Mode
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Exit full-screen mode for viewing images, stories, or posts.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: View Sponsored Content
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: View content marked as sponsored by brands or advertisers.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Unblock a previously blocked user, allowing them to view your posts and interact with you.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the heart icon to like a post.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Comment
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the comment icon to open the comment section of a post.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Share
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the share icon to send the post to others.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Save
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the save icon to add the post to your saved collection.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Follow
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the username button to follow the user who posted the content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the menu button (hamburger icon or bottom navigation) to open app-wide navigation options.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Search
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Tap the search tab to explore content, accounts, or tags.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Provides gesture-based navigation or control functionalities.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Align Button
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Allows alignment of content within the frame.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Remix Layout
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Enables remixing of video layouts and arrangements.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Grooves
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Adds groove effects to videos or photos.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Enable Effects
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Button to enable various visual effects.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Timer
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Sets a countdown timer for taking photos or videos.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Expand Tools Menu
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Displays additional tools and settings.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Boomerang
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Creates a looping video effect similar to a boomerang motion.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Hands-free Mode
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Enables hands-free recording of videos.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Layout Button
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Button to select different layout options for media.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Create Mode
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Accesses creative media creation modes and features.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Title
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Button to add a title to your story or video.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Add Details
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Allows adding more descriptive details to media.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Trivia
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Adds trivia-related content or quizzes to the media.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: This or That
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Feature to create 'This or That' polls or choices.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Close Up
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Zooms in for a close-up effect in photos or videos.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Games
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Accesses in-story or video games and interactive content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Badges
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Feature for adding or displaying badges in your profile or content.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Enable Subscriptions
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Enables viewing or managing subscriptions within the app.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Shopping
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Opens shopping-related features and functionalities.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Audience
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Allows selection or modification of the target audience.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Schedule Live
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Schedules a live video stream at a set time.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Select Multiple
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Button to select multiple images or videos from the gallery.

com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.name: Gallery Navigation
com.instagram.mainactivity.InstagramMain.description: Navigate and select photos or videos from the device gallery.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Open Settings
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Access the settings menu by clicking the 'Settings' button.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: View Profile
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Access the profile section by clicking the 'Profile photo' button.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Log In
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Sign in to your account by clicking the 'Log in' button.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Log Into Another Account
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Sign in using a different Instagram account by clicking the 'Log into another account' button.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Create New Account
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Register a new Instagram account by clicking the 'Create new account' button.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Change Cover Photo
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Double tap on the cover photo preview to change the cover photo.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Edit Cover
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the 'Edit cover' option to make adjustments to the cover photo.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Write Caption
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the caption input area to write a caption and add hashtags.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Add Hashtags
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Use the hashtags suggestion option to add relevant hashtags to your post.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Create Poll
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Use the poll suggestion option to create and add a poll to your post.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Tag People
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Select the 'Tag people' option to tag users in your post.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Add Location
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the 'Add location' option to include a location with the post.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Choose Audience
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Select 'Audience' to decide who can see the post, e.g., everyone.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Set Profile Display
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Choose profile display settings to determine where this post will appear, such as the Main grid and Reels grid.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Rename Audio
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Select 'Rename audio' to change the name of the audio associated with the post.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Save Draft
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the 'Save draft' button to save your current progress on the post as a draft for later editing or sharing.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Share Post
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Press the 'Share' button to publish the post to your profile immediately.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Go Back
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Select the 'Back' button to return to the previous screen.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: New Reel
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Access the 'New reel' screen to start creating a new Instagram Reel.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Edit Highlight Cover
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Tap the 'Edit cover' link to change the cover image for a highlight.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Change Highlight Cover
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click the 'highlight_cover_container' button to modify the cover image of a highlight.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Edit Highlight Title
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Tap the 'highlight_title' button to modify the title of a highlight.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Navigate Tabs
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Switch between different tabs by clicking on the 'Selected' or 'Stories' buttons.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Select Media
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Tap on media images to select or deselect them using the 'selected_item_overlay' and 'media_toggle' buttons.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Go Back
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click the 'Back' button to return to the previous screen.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Confirm Edits
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Tap the 'Done' button to save any changes you have made on this screen.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Open Gallery
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the image with alt text 'Open Gallery' to open the gallery view.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Navigate to Highlight
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on any image with alt text 'Highlight image' to view that specific highlight.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Go Back
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click the back button (id=17) to return to the previous screen or menu.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Edit Cover
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the action bar title (id=18) to open the cover editing interface.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Confirm Changes
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the 'Done' button (id=19) to save any changes made while editing the cover.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Open Menu
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click on the action bar container (id=13) to open the main menu or settings.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Access Media View
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Interact with the media view pager (id=6) to browse through different media or highlights.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: Toggle Punched Overlay
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Click or interact with the punched overlay view (id=5) to toggle or remove the overlay effect on the screen.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: View Status Bar
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Access the status bar area (id=20) to view system notifications or indicators.

om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.name: View Navigation Bar
om.instagram.modal.ModalActivity.description: Access the navigation bar (id=21) for additional navigation options, such as moving between apps or accessing home.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: Browse Reels
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Navigate through different reels using the browse button.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: Create Story Highlight
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Access the option to create a story highlight from a reel.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: Send Story
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Send the current story to another user through a reshare button.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: More Options
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Open additional settings and options related to the reel viewer with the more options button.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: Like Reel
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Engage with the reel by tapping on the like heart icon to show appreciation.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: View Profile
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Click on the profile picture to view the account profile related to the current reel.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: Comment on Reel
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Add a comment on the reel using the 'Add a comment' text view.

om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.name: View Reel Details
om.instagram.modal.TransparentModalActiv.description: Read title and timestamp details of the reel, highlighting its position and how long since it was shared.

i0.name: Log Out Prompt
i0.description: The user is presented with a prompt asking if they are sure they want to log out of their account.

i0.name: Log Out Confirmation
i0.description: The user can confirm their decision to log out by clicking the 'Log out' button.

i0.name: Cancel Log Out
i0.description: The user can cancel the log-out operation by clicking the 'Cancel' button.

i0.name: Open Dialog
i0.description: The dialog containing the log-out confirmation and cancel options is displayed on the screen.

i0.description: The user can scroll through the content in the scrollable area (identified by the 'scroll_view' div).

i0.name: Interact with Sticky Footer
i0.description: The user can interact with elements in the sticky footer at the bottom of the screen, which might contain navigation options or other actionable buttons.

i0.name: Close Dialog
i0.description: The user can close the dialog without taking any action, usually by pressing the 'Cancel' button or tapping outside the dialog.

i0.name: Confirm Action
i0.description: The user can click the primary action button (Log out) to confirm their action.
